name: Hot Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings in two at the joints.
2. Heat oil (or shortening) in a large frying pan or skillet to 360°F.
3. Add the wings and fry until crisp, about 12-15 minutes.
4. To bake: Preheat oven to 450°F. Spread wings out on a baking sheet in one layer and bake for 45 minutes.
5. Make the sauce by combining hot sauce (or Tabasco) with melted butter and stirring thoroughly.
6. Once cooked, drizzle the sauce over the chicken wings and serve immediately.
